ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team plays */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division to which the team belongs */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_manager_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is associated with */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Player's height in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Player's batting hand (L, R, S) */,
  "throwing_hand" TEXT /* Player's throwing hand (L, R) */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's current contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's current contract */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Player's current salary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "playoff_status" TEXT /* Indicator if the team made the playoffs (Yes/No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Games played by the player */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Games started by the player */,
  "innings_pitched" REAL /* Innings pitched by the player */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Wins credited to the player */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Saves credited to the player */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Strikeouts made by the player */,
  "era" REAL /* Earned run average of the player */,
  "whip" REAL /* Walks and hits per inning pitched for the player */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "rbi" INTEGER /* Runs batted in */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage (OBP) */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage (SLG) */,
  "on_base_plus_slugging" REAL /* On-base plus slugging (OPS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Coach's date of birth */,
  "position" TEXT /* Coach's position (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the coach joined the team */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the coach's contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season in which the game was played */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "score_home" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "score_away" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (stadium name) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who created the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Player Performance, Team Strategy) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Final, Published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Analyst's date of birth */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the analyst joined the organization */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization (e.g., Data Science, Sports Science) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_health_stats" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained by the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the player returned to play */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "rehab_status" TEXT /* Current status of rehabilitation (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "rehab_end_date" TEXT /* Expected end date of rehabilitation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_health_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scouting_reports" (
  "scouting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scouting report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being evaluated */,
  "scout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scout who wrote the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "evaluation" TEXT /* Evaluation notes from the scout */,
  "potential_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the player's potential (1-10) */,
  "strengths" TEXT /* Summary of the player's strengths */,
  "weaknesses" TEXT /* Summary of the player's weaknesses */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for player development */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scouting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scouting_reports_scout_id FOREIGN KEY ("scout_id") REFERENCES scouts ("scout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scouting_reports_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scouts" (
  "scout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scout */,
  "scout_name" TEXT /* Full name of the scout */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the scout */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Scout's date of birth */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of scouting experience */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the scout joined the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Coach, Analyst, Scout) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., Read, Write, Admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions granted to the role (e.g., View Reports, Edit Reports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
